input.prompt: List all the indoor activities and venues mentioned on this page, especially those suitable for families with children near Annecy. Include any category names, venue names, and links (URLs).

content.content:
# Indoor Activities & Family-Friendly Venues Near Annecy

## Sport & Games
- **Le Bowl Bowling Annecy** - "16 PISTES + RESTAURANT + NIGHTCLUB" bowling complex in Annecy city
- **Patinoire Jean Régis** - Indoor ice rink with "SÉANCES PUBLIQUES + SOIRÉE DISCO VENDREDI" and skating lessons
- **Atome Climbing** - Indoor climbing gym in downtown Annecy
- **Climb Up Annecy** - Indoor climbing wall facility with "PLUS DE 200 VOIES"

## Water Activities
- **Centre Aquatique Sallanches Mont-Blanc** - Covered aquatic center with pool, activity basin, and wellness area in nearby Sallanches

## Entertainment & Wellness
- **Casino Impérial Palace Annecy** - Lakeside casino with hotel and restaurant
- **Pathé Annecy** - Multiplex cinema with approximately 8 screens

## Kids' Activities
- **Criq'Parc** - Tree-based play park for ages 3-12 on Lake Annecy shores at Saint-Jorioz (just outside Annecy)
- **Parc animalier de la Grande Jeanne** - Free municipal wildlife park accessible year-round

## Workshops
- **Atelier de poterie du Prunier** (Thônes) - Pottery classes for children and adults

[Full listings at https://loisirs74.fr/](https://loisirs74.fr/)

input.prompt: Give the full description, location/address, opening hours, and all prices/tarifs listed for this ice rink. Quote exact prices in euros.

content.content:
# Patinoire Jean Régis, Annecy

**Description:**
"Patinoire couverte de 58 × 28 m gérée par la ville d'Annecy" featuring public skating sessions, Friday disco evenings, and courses in figure skating and hockey.

**Location/Address:**
27 rue du Stade, 74000 Annecy (near Parc des Sports)

**Opening Hours:**
- Wednesday, Saturday, Sunday: 14:00–18:00
- Friday: 20:00–23:00 (disco night)
- Daily during school holidays
- Open year-round

**Prices (2026):**
- Adult: €4.60 + skate rental €3.40
- Children: €3.00
- Seasonal passes available

**Session Duration:** 2 hours

**Accessibility:** Yes (PMR/wheelchair accessible); free onsite parking available

content.content:
# Le Bowl Bowling Annecy

**Description:**
"16 PISTES + RESTAURANT + NIGHTCLUB - complexe loisirs nocturne d'Annecy ville." This venue offers bowling combined with dining and nightclub facilities, marketed as a complete evening experience in one location.

**Location/Address:**
9 Boulevard du Fier, 74000 Annecy (central axis connecting the old town to commercial areas)

**Opening Hours:**
- Monday-Thursday: 2 PM–1 AM
- Friday-Saturday: 2 PM–4 AM
- Sunday: 2 PM–midnight

**Prices (2026):**
- Adults: €8 per game
- Children: €6 per game
- Family packages available for evenings
- Average duration: 30-45 minutes per game

**Additional Details:**
Free onsite parking; PMR-accessible ground floor; children's birthday parties available; Sunday tournaments offered.

content.content:
# Climb Up Annecy - Climbing Gym

**Description:**
"Grande salle d'escalade indoor" operated by the Climb Up national network, featuring climbing routes up to 18 meters, a bouldering area with thick mats, training wall, auto-belay systems, and equipment rental. Courses and group activities available.

**Location/Address:**
Zone industrielle de Seynod/Vovray, 74000 Annecy (to be confirmed)
GPS: ~45.892° N · ~6.108° E

**Opening Hours:**
"Ouvert tous les jours, horaires étendus le soir et le week-end" (Open daily with extended evening/weekend hours). Specific times listed as "to confirm on official site."

**Prices (2026):**
- Adult entry: "~13-16 €"
- Children/students: Reduced rates available
- Subscriptions and 10-entry passes offered
- Equipment rental included with entry
- Public transit (SIBRA): €1.50-€2.50

**Additional Details:**
- Free on-site parking
- Bar/snack available
- Passeport escalade required for autonomous climbing on routes, or initial training session needed
- ~1-3 hours average visit duration

content.text:
I have enough to build the plan. Here are three solid indoor venues, all sourced from **loisirs74.fr**.

## 🌧️ Rainy Afternoon in Annecy — Family Indoor Plan

### 1. 🎳 Le Bowl Bowling — Annecy *(easy, all-ages start)*
- **Where:** 9 Boulevard du Fier, 74000 Annecy (central, free on-site parking)
- **What:** 16-lane bowling complex with restaurant on site — a relaxed, low-effort activity everyone can play together
- **Hours:** Mon–Thu 2 PM–1 AM; Fri–Sat 2 PM–4 AM; Sun 2 PM–midnight
- **Prices:** **€8/game adult**, **€6/game child** (~30–45 min per game); family evening packages available
- Ground floor is PMR-accessible

### 2. ⛸️ Patinoire Jean Régis — Annecy *(covered ice rink)*
- **Where:** 27 rue du Stade, 74000 Annecy (near Parc des Sports, free parking)
- **What:** Covered 58×28 m ice rink with public skating sessions — good rainy-day energy-burner for kids
- **Hours (public sessions):** Wed/Sat/Sun 2 PM–6 PM (open daily during school holidays) — a 2-hour afternoon session fits perfectly
- **Prices:** **Adult €4.60** + skate rental **€3.40**; **Children €3.00**
- Wheelchair accessible

### 3. 🧗 Climb Up Annecy — Indoor Climbing *(for older kids/teens)*
- **Where:** Zone industrielle de Seynod/Vovray, 74000 Annecy (free parking, bar/snack on site)
- **What:** Large indoor climbing gym — routes up to 18 m, bouldering area with thick mats, auto-belay systems, gear rental
- **Hours:** Open daily, extended evening/weekend hours
- **Prices:** **Adult entry ~€13–16**; reduced rates for children/students; 10-entry passes available
- Note: autonomous route climbing needs a "passeport escalade" or an intro session — best suited to bouldering/auto-belay for a casual family visit

### Suggested flow
Start with **bowling** early afternoon (indoors, low-key, lunch on site) → move to the **ice rink** for the 2 PM–6 PM public session, or swap in **Climb Up** if your kids are older and more active.

### Rough budget (family of 4 — 2 adults, 2 children)
- Bowling (1 game each): 2×€8 + 2×€6 = **€28**
- Ice rink (with 2 adult skate rentals): 2×(€4.60+€3.40) + 2×€3.00 = **€22**
- Climb Up instead of one of the above: ~€13–16 × adults + reduced child rates

---
**Source:** All details and prices from [loisirs74.fr](https://loisirs74.fr) (2026 tariffs listed on the site). I only browsed and read pages — no forms submitted, no bookings made. A couple of specifics (Climb Up's exact address/hours, family package details) were flagged "to confirm" on the site itself, so I'd verify those on each venue's official page before you go.
